text:
Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Ex — 21.7 

COMMENT: This field is the ACC risk score calculated from information during the visit. The higher the score, the 
greater the ASCVD risk. If the visit is after the baseline visit, then the RISK_SCORE includes the value 
for that visit. Otherwise, at baseline, the two risk score fields match (i.e., BASELINE_SCORE equals 
RISK_SCORE).
